case_title: RON NAVALES VS. ERIK MENDEZ ARANA

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION RE; RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAVALES, RON
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $150.00) SERVED FEB-06-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARANA, ERIK MENDEZ

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAVALES, RON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARANA, ERIK MENDEZ $4,988.03 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,163.03 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2019 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,988.03 FILED BY NAVALES, RON AS TO DEFENDANT ARANA, ERIK MENDEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ARANA, ERIK MENDEZ
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-07-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-23-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-07-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-07-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF RON NAVALES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERIK MENDEZ ARANA IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS UNTIMELY BY 1 DAY. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
